hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "=== {PROJECT_NAME} 环境预检 ==="; java -version 2>&1 | head -1; mvn -version 2>&1 | head -1; git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null && echo "Git: OK" || echo "Git: 未初始化"; echo "知识库入口: app-knowledge-base/_index.md"; echo "============================="'

bash -c 'CMD="$1"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "(rm -rf|git push --force|git push -f|drop table|drop database|truncate |kubectl delete|delete from .* where 1=1|kill -9)"; then echo "[BLOCKED] 危险命令被拦截: $CMD" >&2; exit 1; fi' -- "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"

bash -c 'FILE="$1"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.java$"; then MODULE=$(echo "$FILE" | grep -oE "{MAVEN_MODULE_PATTERN}" | head -1); if [ -n "$MODULE" ]; then echo "[auto-compile] $MODULE"; cd {PROJECT_ROOT} && mvn compile -pl "$MODULE" -am -q 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; fi' -- "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"

bash -c 'COUNT=$(cat /tmp/.claude_tool_count_$$ 2>/dev/null || echo 0); COUNT=$((COUNT+1)); echo $COUNT > /tmp/.claude_tool_count_$$; if [ $((COUNT % 30)) -eq 0 ]; then echo "\n⚡ [compact-reminder] 已执行 ${COUNT} 次工具调用，建议 /compact"; fi'
